title: 论文提炼｜CANDOR-Bench: Benchmarking In-Memory Continuous ANNS under Dynamic Open-World Streams
content:
论文名称：CANDOR-Bench: Benchmarking In-Memory Continuous ANNS under Dynamic Open-World Streams
研究主题：大模型推理、检索增强与记忆系统
发表 venue：SIGMOD - International Conference on Management of Data
发表年份：2026
作者：Mingqi Wang, Jun Liu, Ruicheng Zhang, Jianjun Zhao, Ruipeng Wan, Xinyan Lei, Shuhao Zhang, Bolong Zheng, Haikun Liu, Xiaofei Liao, Hai Jin
作者角色：你是通讯作者
一句话总结：Continuous approximate nearest neighbor search over streaming vector data is increasingly important in open-world settings where distributions drift, noise accumulates, and concurrent access is common.
核心内容：
Continuous approximate nearest neighbor search over streaming vector data is increasingly important in open-world settings where distributions drift, noise accumulates, and concurrent access is common. Existing benchmarks focus on static or simplified streaming scenarios and therefore fail to capture the dynamic behavior of real-world workloads. CANDOR-Bench addresses this gap by building a benchmarking framework for in-memory ANNS under dynamic open-world streams, enabling systematic evaluation of ingestion latency, retrieval quality, and update efficiency under high-churn, continuously evolving workloads. The framework provides a reusable basis for studying dynamic vector retrieval systems beyond static ANN settings.
适合回答的问题：
- 这篇论文主要解决什么问题，以及它为什么重要。
- 这篇论文的核心方法、系统设计或算法思路是什么。
- 这篇论文与 大模型推理、检索增强与记忆系统 这条研究主线的关系是什么。
